content.en:
Not long after, Ye Tian finished reading all the information about the Extreme Dao Deep Sea here.

The material here only touches on some of the basics, but the more detailed ones are gone.

In fact, the powerhouses of the Wudao Tower do not enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and they may not really understand many things.

Through these information, Ye Tian knew one thing, that is, the end of the realm did not want to provoke the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and the Daoless Tower was not qualified to provoke the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

But it is undeniable that there are really many resources in the Extreme Deep Sea, and it is also the easiest place to give birth to Extreme Treasure Treasures.

Countless powerhouses at the end of the realm are afraid that they want to occupy the extreme deep sea, but unfortunately their strength is not good.

"I entered the Extreme Dao Deep Sea as a Void Sparrow, as long as I keep a low profile and don't enter the line of sight of those Extreme Dao creatures who are perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, or attract attention, it should be very safe!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As long as he stays in the Extreme Deep Sea, the benefits he will gain are absolutely unimaginable.

In particular, he also befriended the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, which was a good start.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian browsed some other information here, such as how many eternal heavens and earths there are at the end of the realm, and there are many eternal worlds like the Origin Realm Sea, which are not worth mentioning.

But there were dozens of Eternal Heavens and Heavens that could reach the level of the Eternal Ruins, and eight of them were even more powerful than the Eternal Ruins.

"The Ruins of Eternity are ranked as the ninth Eternal Heaven and Earth, and it is not bad to be in the end of the realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And the most powerful Eternal Heaven and Earth is the Extreme Dao True River, the Extreme Dao True River has been integrated into an extremely powerful Extreme Dao Treasure, so the entire Eternal Heaven and Earth exudes a trace of Extreme Dao breath, and many Extreme Dao Treasures have also been born in the Extreme Dao True River, and the cultivation environment is very good, so there are more perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm.

There are only thirty-four Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Eternal Ruins, but there are as many as hundreds of Extreme Path Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Dao True River, and their strength is much stronger than that of the Eternal Ruins.

Extreme Dao True River is also the only Eternal Heaven and Earth where the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller has reached hundreds of Eternal Realms, and the number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of other Eternal Realms is in the dozens.

"Looking at it this way, the number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm is quite a lot, it must have exceeded a thousand! If you add the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers among some special creatures at the Edge of the Realm, as well as scattered cultivation, maybe the total number will be close to two thousand!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers in the Extreme Deep Sea may exceed two thousand, or it may be about the same, and the gap between the two sides at the level of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers is definitely not large, otherwise they will not be able to compete.

However, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea all belong to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, while the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm belong to the major forces, which is a bit chaotic.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian had read almost all the information here, and the whole person's vision had risen to a level, as if he had broken away from the previous level and jumped to the level of the end of the realm.

"My strength is still very weak, only when I become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, can I be considered a real strong!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Subsequently, he went back.

Next, he had to work hard to become the perfect master of the Shroud.

How to become the perfect master of the Void Realm, he also knows it now.

First of all, it is necessary to raise the cultivation to the limit of the super-perfect master, that is, the perfect ancestor, will, and control power are all raised to the limit of the super-perfect master.

And if it were him, that would be to raise the Endless Extreme Dao Ancestor, Extreme Dao Will, and Extreme Dao Power to the current limit, and he was far from achieving this step at present.

After reaching this point, the next step is to ascend to the extreme path.

Ye Tian broke through with the Endless Pole Dao, then he would be able to impact the Endless Pole Dao to impact the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and at the very least, he would have to raise the Endless Pole Dao to the Xiaocheng realm.

The Extreme Dao is also divided into four realms: Entry, Small Success, Dacheng and Consummation, and it is very difficult to improve the Extreme Dao, especially for those who break through with their own Extreme Dao, it is very difficult to improve their own Extreme Dao.

However, once it breaks through, the increase in strength is naturally terrifying.

It's like a Polar Realm Perfect Controller who breaks through with his own Extreme Realm, and his strength completely crushes other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and it is normal to kill in seconds in an instant.

This is also why countless Perfectionists of the Extreme Creation Realm are eager to comprehend their own extreme paths, not for the present, but for the future.

Everyone wants to be invincible, and if you want to be invincible in a realm, it is necessary to comprehend your own extreme path!

"If I want to ascend to the Xiaocheng realm, it is very difficult, but it's not that I can't do it, it just takes some time. The Endless Extreme Dao has now ruled over the other Extreme Paths, and if the realm of the other Extreme Paths is raised, it will naturally improve the realm of the Endless Extreme Dao. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is the benefit of comprehending one's own extreme path, you don't need to specifically improve your own extreme path, you only need to improve other extreme paths.

It's just that Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao is composed of a large number of Extreme Dao, so he needs to comprehend more Extreme Dao, so naturally he needs more time.

Fortunately, he devoured the Void Sparrow, and it became very easy to comprehend the Extreme Dao, otherwise he didn't know how many infinite years he would have to spend to improve the Endless Extreme Dao!

"Let's comprehend the Spatial Extreme Dao first, if I first comprehend the Spatial Extreme Dao to the Xiaocheng realm, my strength will also be able to improve a lot!" Ye Tianyan said.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian did his best to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Space.

As for Ye Tian's copy body, the Void Sparrow, he was also looking for resources in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, such as the Extreme Dao Treasure that could transform the Perfect-level Ancestral Fu.

I have to say that although such an Extreme Treasure is also precious in the Extreme Deep Sea, it can still be bought.

It's just that many Extreme Dao creatures don't dare to swallow such Extreme Dao treasures, in case they let their own talents mutate and become weaker, it won't be good.

Therefore, there are very few Extreme Dao creatures that dare to mutate their own perfect-level ancestral endowments.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian had purchased a lot of Extreme Dao Treasures that could mutate Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments, but none of these Extreme Dao Treasures had the power to attract the copying talent.

Obviously, these extreme treasures were of little use to him.

"Originally, I thought that these extreme treasures might attract replication talents and make them transform, but it seems that it is a little difficult. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't absorb these Extreme Dao Treasures, although they could mutate the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, but he didn't lack mutated Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments now, because some Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea had mutated Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments, and he could just copy them directly, and he didn't need to devour the Extreme Realm Treasures himself.

As the years passed, Ye Tian found a lot of treasures in the Extreme Deep Sea, but there was no way to transform the copying talent.

this day.

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix sent a token - the Xuandao Order!

This token is a token to participate in a special trade fair, without which you cannot enter that trade fair.

And the Xuandao Order has a lot of fame in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, even some Extreme Dao creatures who are perfect controllers of the Void Realm may not be able to obtain a Xuandao Order, and I don't know how many Extreme Dao creatures want to obtain it.

With the Xuandao Order, there is hope for obtaining some resources that cannot be traded by the outside world and are restricted.

Although there are many resources in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, some resources are strictly limited, and ordinary Extreme Dao creatures or descendants of Extreme Dao creatures cannot get them at all.

"The Xuan Dao Order is really good for me, you can go and see it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
